bank.retain_mission: Extract domain-specific decisions, regulatory and compliance constraints, workflow designs, and outcomes across the specialized practices represented here (legal, healthcare, real estate, HR, compliance, identity/trust, blockchain, regional consulting, document generation, and more).
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about the practice area, jurisdictions, regulatory regimes, key counterparties, and recurring workflows. Ignore one-off matters and ephemeral case noise.

mental_models.name: Domain Context
mental_models.source_query: What domain is the user operating in, and what regulatory, jurisdictional, and stakeholder constraints apply? Include the specialty (legal, healthcare, finance ops, identity, etc.) and the locale.

mental_models.name: Workflow Patterns
mental_models.source_query: Which workflows, document templates, and review/approval steps recur? What patterns have proven reliable, and where do exceptions usually appear?
